rp_ble_setup.tooltip: Initialize BLE Bluetooth and set the device name

rp_ble_setup_simple.tooltip: Initialize BLE Bluetooth with default name

rp_ble_start_advertising.tooltip: Start BLE broadcast so other devices can discover it

rp_ble_start_scanning.tooltip: Start scanning for surrounding BLE devices

rp_ble_on_advertisement.message0: When the BLE broadcast is scanned, the device information is stored in %1
rp_ble_on_advertisement.tooltip: Execute code when a BLE device broadcast is scanned

rp_ble_adv_get_address.message0: Get the device address of broadcast %1
rp_ble_adv_get_address.tooltip: Get the MAC address of the broadcasting device

rp_ble_adv_get_rssi.message0: Get the signal strength (RSSI) of broadcast %1
rp_ble_adv_get_rssi.tooltip: Get the signal strength RSSI of the broadcasting device

rp_ble_adv_is_ibeacon.tooltip: Check if the broadcast is an iBeacon

rp_ble_adv_name_has_prefix.message0: Broadcast %1 The device name starts with %2
rp_ble_adv_name_has_prefix.tooltip: Checks whether the broadcast device name starts with the specified prefix

rp_ble_add_characteristic.message0: Add feature UUID %1 Attribute %2 Initial value %3

rp_ble_add_characteristic_dynamic.message0: Add dynamic feature UUID %1 attribute %2 ID %3
rp_ble_add_characteristic_dynamic.tooltip: Add a dynamic feature, reading and writing are handled through callbacks

rp_ble_on_device_connected.message0: When a BLE device is connected, the device stores %1
rp_ble_on_device_connected.tooltip: Execute code when the BLE device is successfully connected

rp_ble_on_device_disconnected.tooltip: Execute code when BLE device disconnects

rp_ble_on_characteristic_read.message0: When the feature is read Feature ID %1 Buffer %2 Buffer Size %3
rp_ble_on_characteristic_read.tooltip: Code is executed when the dynamic feature is read and the data length needs to be returned

rp_ble_on_characteristic_write.message0: When the feature is written Feature ID %1 Data %2 Data Length %3
rp_ble_on_characteristic_write.tooltip: Execute code when dynamic features are written

rp_ble_write_buffer.tooltip: Write data to buffer (used in feature read callbacks)

rp_ble_connect.message0: Connect BLE device Address %1 Timeout %2 milliseconds
rp_ble_connect.tooltip: Connect to the BLE device at the specified address

rp_ble_connect_adv.tooltip: Connect to the scanned BLE broadcast device
